plan: create-user (module: user-management)
Layer 0
  - CreateUserUseCase (input-port) → port/in/CreateUserUseCase.java
  - User (aggregate-root) → domain/User.java
  - UserRepository (output-port) → port/out/UserRepository.java
Layer 1
  - UserController (rest-adapter) → adapter/in/web/UserController.java
  - UserServiceImpl (service) → application/UserServiceImpl.java
